existing_features.title: Update the main header so it is not sticky and does not remain fixed while the page scrolls (i.e., remove the sticky positioning behavior so the header is placed at the top of the document flow).

Center the header logo horizontally within the top header area (desktop and mobile) and increase its visual clarity/visibility (e.g., larger size and stronger contrast against the header background), while preserving the existing logo fallback behavior when the image fails to load.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove sticky behavior from the three headers; place them entirely at the top of the page
Center the logo and increase its visibility/clarity in the header area

projectName: Remove sticky header behavior and center/clarify header logo
